taxReliefDescription: The employee's Housing Levy contribution qualifies as a tax relief, effectively reducing PAYE payable
notes: The Affordable Housing Levy (AHL) was introduced by the Finance Act 2023
The Supreme Court of Kenya upheld the levy's constitutionality in November 2023
Both employer and employee each contribute 1.5% of gross salary
The employee's contribution qualifies for tax relief against PAYE
Contributions are remitted through the eCitizen/i-Tax platform by the 9th of the following month
Self-employed persons also contribute 1.5% of their declared income
The levy funds the Affordable Housing Programme aimed at delivering 250,000 housing units
